items.title: 💦 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
items.summary: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: BBL returns to Christmas Eve, Australia Day final
items.summary: Christmas Day remains free of BBL action but the final will be played on January 26
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: MLB All-Stars Express Optimism For New CBA While Pushing Back On Salary Cap
items.summary: Major League Baseball is facing a potential work stoppage over management's proposed salary cap.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
